description: This pipeline appears to be designed for image processing and analysis, specifically for biomedical microscopic images. It starts by loading and filtering files from input folders, followed by converting region of interest (ROI) lists to masks and applying morphological operations to greyscale images. The pipeline also involves annotating data with other information, distributing data across output slots, and training a model using the annotated data. Additionally, it includes steps for listing files in folders, filtering paths, and creating annotations from path names. Overall, the pipeline seems to be aimed at preparing and processing image data for further analysis or modeling, with a focus on ROI-based operations and data annotation.

a21e63ab-f72d-4833-ab2a-ed213a79192d.name: distribute-data
a21e63ab-f72d-4833-ab2a-ed213a79192d.description:
Distributes data across the output slots, so a certain percentage of data is in the specified slot. Please note that negative weights will be replaced by zero. The output data is unique, meaning that there will be no overlaps between different slots.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.

891faee4-2337-4387-9eb9-b0eccd67cc09.name: ij1-roi-to-mask
891faee4-2337-4387-9eb9-b0eccd67cc09.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

99c6a081-bebb-4413-bc8d-668588f6710a.name: import-imagej-roi-from-file
99c6a081-bebb-4413-bc8d-668588f6710a.description: Loads a ROI list from a file. The file can be either a single ROI (.roi extension) or a list of ROI (.zip extension).

1612d438-f3e3-483b-8bb6-800455b8a1cd.name: cellpose-training-2
1612d438-f3e3-483b-8bb6-800455b8a1cd.description:
Deprecated. Use the node with the same name.

Trains a model with Cellpose. You start from an existing model or train from scratch. Incoming images are automatically converted to greyscale. Only 2D or 3D images are supported. For this node to work, you need to annotate a greyscale 16-bit or 8-bit label image column to each raw data input. To do this, you can use the node 'Annotate with data'. By default, JIPipe will ensure that all connected components of this image are assigned a unique component. You can disable this feature via the parameters.

This algorithm merges all annotations and data annotations. Use the iteration step settings to determine how annotations and data annotations are merged

84e5fb0b-2bcc-460c-9135-358c41f9dfd7.name: folder-list-files
84e5fb0b-2bcc-460c-9135-358c41f9dfd7.description: Lists all files in the input folder

6af06756-70fd-4ed8-a03f-26aacc9a03f1.name: path-filter
6af06756-70fd-4ed8-a03f-26aacc9a03f1.description: Filters the paths (files/folders) by their name or absolute path

a2758ddd-c075-4ff6-b6a5-71bae69689e4.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
a2758ddd-c075-4ff6-b6a5-71bae69689e4.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

d79baa95-7234-4fa7-a475-d84128ca9ad2.name: folder-list-files
d79baa95-7234-4fa7-a475-d84128ca9ad2.description: Lists all files in the input folder

c678ab03-9023-4692-b97c-fdd25bd09709.name: path-to-annotation-simple
c678ab03-9023-4692-b97c-fdd25bd09709.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.

dc3fd8ae-61b3-4596-9a86-764824a996a5.name: annotate-with-data
dc3fd8ae-61b3-4596-9a86-764824a996a5.description:
Annotates the incoming data with the other data.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
